examples: The flowers inside our garden are very beautiful.
He works very hard.

meaning_th: วิดีโอ, ภาพวีดิทัศน์
meaning_en: the recording, reproducing, or broadcasting of moving visual images
examples: She loves to watch English conversational practice videos online.

meaning_th: รอ, รอคอย
meaning_en: stay in place or remain in readiness or expectation of something to happen
examples: Please wait a brief moment; the team meeting starts soon.

meaning_th: บริกรชาย, พนักงานเสิร์ฟชาย
meaning_en: a man whose job is to serve customers at their tables in a restaurant
examples: The waiter brought our delicious fried chicken dish quickly.

meaning_th: เดิน, การเดิน
meaning_en: move at a regular pace by lifting and setting down each foot in turn
examples: We decided to walk around the beautiful island seaside.
He walks his dog.

meaning_th: กำแพง, ผนังห้อง
meaning_en: a continuous vertical solid structure that encloses or protects an area or forms the sides of a room
examples: The large clock on the office wall shows 10 o'clock sharp.

meaning_th: ต้องการ, อยากได้
meaning_en: have a desire to possess or do something; wish for
examples: I want to study vocabulary using this database tool.

meaning_th: น้ำ, รดน้ำต้นไม้
meaning_en: a colorless, transparent, odorless liquid that forms the seas, lakes, and rivers; pour liquid over plants
examples: Can I have a bottle of fresh water, please?
Please water the front garden plant.

meaning_th: ปี
meaning_en: the time taken by a planet to make one revolution around the sun; a period of 365 days
examples: They plan to build a new head office building here next year.

meaning_th: สีเหลือง
meaning_en: of a color like that of an egg yolk or ripe lemons
examples: The leaves turn yellow and red in autumn.

meaning_th: ใช่, ครับ, ค่ะ (คำตอบรับ)
meaning_en: used to give an affirmative response
examples: Yes, I agree with your software test automation parameters completely.

meaning_th: เมื่อวาน, เมื่อวานนี้
meaning_en: on the day before today
pronounce_th: เยสเทอร์เดย์
examples: The company president visited our head office yesterday morning.

meaning_th: คุณ, เธอ, พวกคุณ
meaning_en: used to refer to the person or people that the speaker is addressing
examples: Thank you very much! Your English conversational skills are excellent.

meaning_th: หนุ่มสาว, เด็ก, อายุน้อย
meaning_en: having lived or existed for only a short time
examples: When I was young, I could run very fast on the farm yard.

meaning_th: ของคุณ, ของเธอ
meaning_en: belonging to or associated with the person or people that the speaker is addressing
examples: Please update your technical qualifications inside your resume draft.

meaning_th: สวนสัตว์
meaning_en: an establishment which maintains a collection of wild animals, typically in a park or gardens, for study, conservation, or display to the public
examples: I saw a very large wild elephant at the city zoo.
